app.privacy.sections.cache.body: We use LocalStorage to save your theme preferences, language choices, and temporary form drafts. All of this data is stored locally on your device and will not be uploaded to our servers.
app.privacy.sections.cache.title: Cookies and Cache
app.privacy.sections.collection.body: WHU.sb only collects course-related data such as review information, semesters, and years that you voluntarily provide. Our system does not actively collect your real name, student ID, or any directly sensitive information.
app.privacy.sections.collection.title: Data Collection
app.privacy.sections.contact.body: If you have any questions about privacy issues, or if you believe a review violates your rights, please contact our support team or submit an appeal via GitHub.
app.privacy.sections.contact.title: Contact Us
app.privacy.subtitle: Privacy Policy
app.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
app.terms.sections.conduct.body: WHU.sb aims to provide a harmonious and authentic academic exchange environment. It is forbidden to post any false, abusive, advertising, or inflammatory content unrelated to the course. We reserve the right to delete inappropriate content.
app.terms.sections.conduct.title: Usage Guidelines
app.terms.sections.copyright.body: The WHU.sb platform source code is open sourced under the MIT license. The copyright of the text content posted by users belongs to the author, but the platform is authorized to use it globally for free permanently.
app.terms.sections.copyright.title: Copyright and Agreement
app.terms.sections.disclaimer.body: All reviews on this platform are the personal views of the users and do not represent the position of the official Wuhan University or the project team. Review information is for reference only, and the decision and consequences of choosing a course are borne by the individual.
app.terms.sections.disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
app.terms.subtitle: Terms of Service
app.terms.title: Terms of Service
